atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right hip pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right hip pain since February 2020.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain has been worsening with movement.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the pain as present when pivoting.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the pain as present whenever he moves.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient rates the pain as 2-7 on a scale.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain started after walking around the infusion room.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain is now present with any movement.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports feeling better when still.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient instructs not to stay still.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has had multiple surgeries, including PCL, infertility, and gallbladder removal.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's family history includes high blood pressure, diabetes, thyroid disease, heart disease, kidney disease, and gastric ulcers.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is allergic to percocet, vicodin, and regulin.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The most likely diagnosis is right hip degenerative joint disease.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination revealed no ankle edema or calf tenderness.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Vital signs were blood pressure 115/75, pulse 67, and no fever or chills.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Neurological examination was unremarkable, with intact sensory and motor function and normal deep tendon reflexes.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Range of motion in the right hip was decreased with pain during internal and external rotation and with resisted hip flexion.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient will be prescribed NSAIDs as needed for pain relief.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is instructed to use a cane to offload the right side.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: We will proceed with a cortisone injection into the right hip joint today.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is instructed to explain the risks of injection, sterile technique, and COVID precautions.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Follow-up will be scheduled in three months for repeat injection if needed.
